programme.title: The Haunted Cop Shop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong police station used to be a clubhouse of the Japanese at the time of their occupation of the city during World War II. However, at the end of the war, many of the Japanese committed haka-kiri in the clubhouse. In the present time, after thief Sneaky Ming was captured and incarcerated at the station, he was lured into a world of the paranormal by the spirits of those still inhabiting the building. He was tricked into unleashing the fierce General Issei, who resurrects into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the city. As a result, police officers Kam Mark-K and Man-Chill attempt to put a stop to the terror.

programme.title: Haunted Office
programme.desc: In every lunar July, there would be nine persons died in this building and no one knows the reason. Ken came to this building for interview. He saw several ladies talking about ghost story in the lobby. Amongst the ladies, he found his old girlfriend, Pat and another attractive girl who was wearing a red dress...

programme.title: Fractured Follies
programme.desc: Since Nam has been swindled of his life savings by his scheming cousin on a ruined site, his crippled daughter May takes up the hard task of turning the premise into a supermarket. May is injured in a traffic accident caused by taxi-driver Joe who assumes his reckless driving has made May a cripple. He then volunteers to help her to set up the supermarket. Love blossoms. Joe sells his taxi in order to invest in the supermarket, forcing his brother, Sea, and sister, Cher to work there too. Sea falls for May's cousin Scarlet who fancies only Joe...

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: Fractured Follies

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Jeffery is a hired killer who blinds a singer Jennie during his last job. Feeling guilty, he picks a contract to kill a head of a drug syndicate to pay for her eye operation...

programme.title: E6 - 帥氣舞蹈老師來相親
programme.desc: 明星助力官繼續傾情加盟，通過快問快答揭秘明星不為人知的經歷和情感往事，以獨特視角助陣男女嘉賓尋找真愛。以星素之間和代際之間的磁場碰撞，解讀當下年輕人的婚戀觀。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 藥商之女許婉寧前世遭丈夫背叛、親生骨肉被害，含恨重生；為了守護孩子並復仇，她與調查禁藥的金鱗衛大督主裴珩結盟，兩人從互有成見的試探，到相知相許的聯手，不僅粉碎了危害朝政的驚天陰謀，更在夢境與現實的交錯中，讓女主重獲自救的勇氣，開啟了全新人生。

programme.title: E1 - 社交局秒變「修羅場」
programme.desc: 「音樂+旅行+社交」的唱演真人秀，由王赫野、王琳凱、張碧晨三位老友攜手劉雨昕、周震南、姚曉棠、容祖兒等多位新朋友，跟隨「音你小隊」開啟全新的集體旅居生活；音樂人將在絕美的自然風光中尋找創作靈感，通過音樂與當地人產生連接與互動，帶來一場充滿人情味的治療音樂之旅。

programme.title: E1 - 社交局秒變「修羅場」
programme.desc: 「音樂+旅行+社交」的唱演真人秀，由王赫野、王琳凱、張碧晨三位老友攜手劉雨昕、周震南、姚曉棠、容祖兒等多位新朋友，跟隨「音你小隊」開啟全新的集體旅居生活；音樂人將在絕美的自然風光中尋找創作靈感，通過音樂與當地人產生連接與互動，帶來一場充滿人情味的治療音樂之旅。

programme.title: E13 - 劉宇寧組長腿男團
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. programme.title: TV Patrol Global Edition
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E118 - April Fools Rules / Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: E316 - Pablum Plankton / MuseBob ModelPants
programme.desc: Plankton wins a 'cutest baby' contest and becomes the face of a baby food brand. // When Squidward's one-off portrait of SpongeBob takes the art world by storm, he has no choice but to produce more.

programme.title: E260 - Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: E302 - Insta-Gran
programme.desc: Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: E210 - iKiss
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: E307 - Sammy Suckerfish / Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: E297 - Blood Is Thicker Than Grease / Don't Make Me Laugh
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.title: E613 - Crashed Course / Puns and Buns
programme.desc: The Loud siblings intervene when they think Lori is failing out of Fairway U. // Benny struggles to rein in Luan and her practical jokes when she becomes his coworker at the Burpin'Burger.

programme.title: E263 - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: E122 - #Lumpatious
programme.desc: Sam and Cat make a bet with the annoying older brother of a babysitting client that 'lumpatious' is a real word. When they discover it is not, they must figure out how to get it in the dictionary.

programme.title: E109 - Party Party

E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E3 -Let's Ride The School Bus!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers introduce the school bus! With stories and songs, we learn what it is, how it takes kids to school, and its fun features like wheels, wipers, and a horn! Learning is an exciting ride.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E12 -Let's Eat Healthy Food!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers explore everything about healthy food: where it comes from, where we can buy it, trying new foods, and how it helps us get energy, stay healthy, and grow strong!

His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E3 -Let's Ride The School Bus!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers introduce the school bus! With stories and songs, we learn what it is, how it takes kids to school, and its fun features like wheels, wipers, and a horn! Learning is an exciting ride.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E71
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E3 - Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: E5 - A Very Caputo Wedding
programme.desc: Say ciao with Theresa and the Caputos as the big day finally arrives! Theresa and her family travel to Lake Como for the wedding between Larry Jr and Leah. Spirit can't help but be part of the prep.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: E23 - Spaghetti With Semi-Dried Tomato Pesto & Broccolini With Sausages
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: E4 - Trouble On The Tarmac
programme.desc: A combative passenger responds with punches when asked to follow FAA regulations. When air marshals attempt to remove a man from the wing of a stationary aircraft, he plummets to the ground.

programme.title: E5 - A Very Caputo Wedding
programme.desc: Say ciao with Theresa and the Caputos as the big day finally arrives! Theresa and her family travel to Lake Como for the wedding between Larry Jr and Leah. Spirit can't help but be part of the prep.

Women's Super League 2025/26 E70 -Liverpool vs Aston Villa
UEFA Champions League 2025/26 E91 -Bodo/Glimt vs Juventus - MD5
E9
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

E4 - Homeward Bound?
programme.desc: The team travel through Azerbaijan, Georgia and Turkey, where they re-join the First Overland route at last. Now it's a road-race through Europe to be home in time for Christmas.

programme.title: E1 - Volcano Worlds
programme.desc: Professor Brian Cox explores planets and moons covered in volcanoes. He encounters alien landscapes bursting with fire and ice - eruptions so violent they reach into space.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: On the famous Ho Chi Minh Trail, Guy visits a Huey helicopter graveyard, makes his own version of napalm and comes face to face with a live cluster bomb left over from the war.

programme.title: C Dans L'air:2026
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: E7 - Shallot, Ham And Apple Tart
programme.desc: In Calvados, David Gallienne meets chef Stephane. Together, they tackle two typically Norman sweet and savoury recipes: a shallot and apple tart, accompanied by a country ham with apples flambeed in Calvados.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E37 - The Hollow Tree
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: E14 - Simone Pheulpin/Julian Klausner/Sophie Brillouet
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

E411 - Volleybull! / Diferente Es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.title: E217 - The Crew Celebrates Builder Covegiving Day / The Crew Builds A Rocket Ship
programme.desc: After Speed Meister sabotages Builder Covegiving Day, it's up to the pups to save the holiday for everyone in Builder Cove. // Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: E201 - Granny Zanny / Croc Gets A Job
programme.desc: Crocodile tries to impress Daisy's grandmother when she comes to visit. // Mr. Crocodile realizes he doesn't have an official 'job' and goes in search of the perfect one.

programme.title: E103 - The Crew Builds An Ice Cream Shop / The Crew Fixes A Squeak
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: E115 - Picnic
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go for a picnic. Daddy Pig falls asleep after eating so much, but then gets some exercise being chased by a wasp!

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E117 - The Lost Capybara Kids
programme.desc: Two capybaras can't be found after a game of hide-and-seek in the wetlands.

programme.title: E102 - The Crew Builds A Big Bike Shop / The Crew Builds A Super Tub
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it! // When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day.

programme.title: E252 - Stars
programme.desc: It is night time and the sky is full of stars. Mummy and Daddy Pig let Peppa and George put their coats on and they go outside to look at the stars. The stars look very tiny, but when Peppa and George look through a telescope the stars look bigger.

programme.title: E313 - Pups Save Old Trusty / Pups Save A Pony
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups need to unplug Old Trusty the geyser to stop water sprouting up all over town. // Priscilla the pony gets the chance to help the Paw Patrol rescue their own vehicle after they help her out of a canyon.

programme.title: E907 - Pups Save The Tooth Fairy / Pups Solve The Mystery Of The Missing Art
programme.desc: Julius loses his tooth and has a dream that the Paw Patrol saves a bumbling Tooth Fairy. // When all the paintings mysteriously disappear from the Art Museum festival, the PAW Patrol must solve the Missing Art Mystery and return all the paintings.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E401 - Backpack's Charm
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before!

programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile throw a community picnic to help their neighbors become friends.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E12 - Sub Sahara
programme.desc: The latitudes south of the Sahara offer vastly different battlegrounds for a wide range of warriors. Male giraffes swing their heads like wrecking balls, zebras boast the most powerful kick in the animal kingdom, and chimpanzee warfare is eerily familiar.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E4 - Milton, Cash and Bentley
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey’s birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E1 - Super Sight
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals

programme.title: E2 - Chinga the Lion Cub
programme.desc: In South Africa’s Greater Kruger Park, A little cub called Chiga has been born into family of hunters - the Mala Mala lion pride. Under the guidance of a devoted father, a fierce mother, and a playful sister, Chiga finds her place in the pride.

programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E7 - Hopes And Goals
programme.desc: Both expedition teams are in Italy for a new week of training. They experience their first night on a portaledge, suspended from the face of a steep wall. It is also time for the teams to define the goal of their final major expedition.

programme.title: E1 - The Gateway To The Verdon
programme.desc: At the gateway to the Verdon, Hugo Guinet harvests spinach and raises chickens. Philippe de Santis heads off in search of truffles, once cleaned his precious harvest will be sold at the market in Aups. And, to end, we go hiking in the mountains to discover their biodiversity.

programme.title: Romania - Torn Between Work And Home
programme.desc: In the 1990s, many Romanians left their homeland in search of work. They left behind deserted villages: children were raised by their grandparents, the elderly lived alone, and communities fell apart.

programme.title: The Global Industrial Business Model Is Breaking. Is Software The Answer?
programme.desc: Thomas Saueressig, a member of the SAP executive board, discusses whether global business is moving away from pure efficiency and toward resilience, security and geopolitical risk management. It also looks at AI adoption inside companies, Germany's software weakness, and the new digital chokepoints forming around cloud, chips, data and cybersecurity.

programme.title: Minefield Europe - The Return Of A Banned Weapon
programme.desc: Landmines can maim and kill civilians and are banned in many countries under the 1997 Ottawa Treaty. Yet on Europe's northeastern border, these controversial weapons are making a comeback.

programme.title: The Logic Of The Many - The Swarm Principle
programme.desc: Researchers are investigating how animals behave in swarms. Their findings are being applied to robotics, logistics and new models of participation - and are opening up new perspectives for business and democracy.

programme.title: The Global Industrial Business Model Is Breaking. Is Software The Answer?

programme.title: Deep Dive Into Classical Music
programme.desc: Dive into the world of classical music with a sonic journey featuring Bach, Beethoven and Shostakovich. Enjoy rare works, such as Philip Glass's minimalist music and the bright sound of the harpsichord.

programme.title: Minefield Europe - The Return Of A Banned Weapon
programme.desc: Landmines can maim and kill civilians and are banned in many countries under the 1997 Ottawa Treaty. Yet on Europe's northeastern border, these controversial weapons are making a comeback.

programme.title: Minefield Europe - The Return Of A Banned Weapon
programme.desc: Landmines can maim and kill civilians and are banned in many countries under the 1997 Ottawa Treaty. Yet on Europe's northeastern border, these controversial weapons are making a comeback.

programme.title: Where Will We Mine Next?
programme.desc: As countries race to secure critical minerals for the green tech transition, like cobalt, platinum and rare earth elements, both deep sea and deep space mining are quickly going from science fiction to reality. Which one will supply the materials of the future, and will journeying into the abyss below - or above - solve our problems, or create new and unfixable ones?

programme.title: God of Gambler's Return
programme.desc: Five years have passed since the events of the first God of Gamblers film. Ko Chun is now living a peaceful retirement on his French estate with his pregnant wife Wan Yau, while his disciples Knife and Sing have become world-renowned in their own right. Chun declines repeated challenges from other top-ranked gamblers, having given up gambling in favor of the quiet life. Chun's friend and former bodyguard, Lung Wu, the 'God Of Guns', comes to pay him a visit. While the two are away from the house for a friendly shooting competition, Chau Siu-Chee, a Taiwanese gambler and the world's number one contender to Ko Chun's title, arrives and murders his wife and unborn son in order to goad Chun into a gambling match. After a shootout with Chau Siu-Chee's henchmen, Ko Chun arrives to discover his wife dying. With her last breath, she asks Chun to promise that he will not gamble or admit his real identity for one year, in the hopes that he will not lose his life in an impulsive act of

programme.title: Midnight Sun
programme.desc: Misol, who has a rare condition that prevents her from being exposed to sunlight, has long given up on both dreams and love. One day, she falls in love at first sight with Minjun, the 'fruit truck guy' who shows up in front of her house. To see him again, Misol eagerly counts down to sunset each day. Minjun, who's out selling fruit with determination each night, finds himself drawn to Misol, who only sings under the cover of darkness. Captivated by her Cinderella-like charm, Minjun soon begins to look forward to the night just as much. As the two grow closer, they begin to share their dreams and love... supporting one another as Misol pursues her path as a singer-songwriter, and Minjun takes on the challenge of becoming an actor...

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Western Australia
programme.desc: From the towering Karri forests of Warren National Park to the ancient rock formations of The Pinnacles, Western Australia’s southern region is a treasure of natural wonders. In the final installment of Experience Australia, we highlight the best experiences for visitors to this magical region. Explore the pristine coastline and cuddly wildlife residents of Rottnest Island, immerse yourself in an indigenous cultural experience at Yanchep National Park, and embark on a thrilling sea voyage to encounter the elusive killer whale.

programme.title: E5 - Gary and Lou With Alice
programme.desc: British eccentrics Lou and Gary recently moved to the Yukon and are seeking space for livestock in the gold rush town of Dawson City.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E1 - Plane Crashes
programme.desc: Aviation is one of the safest forms of travel—until something goes terribly wrong. This episode of Fatal Engineering dives deep into the stories behind some of the most devastating plane crashes in modern history. Through expert analysis, recreations, and insider accounts, we uncover how small design flaws, rushed procedures, and ignored warnings contributed to catastrophic failures. Discover what really brought these aircraft down—and how those tragedies led to life-saving innovations.

programme.title: E1 - Plane Crashes
programme.desc: Aviation is one of the safest forms of travel—until something goes terribly wrong. Discover what really brought these aircraft down—and how those tragedies led to life-saving innovations.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E10 - Southern Western Australia
programme.desc: From the towering Karri forests of Warren National Park to the ancient rock formations of The Pinnacles, Western Australia’s southern region is a treasure of natural wonders. In the final installment of Experience Australia, we highlight the best experiences for visitors to this magical region. Explore the pristine coastline and cuddly wildlife residents of Rottnest Island, immerse yourself in an indigenous cultural experience at Yanchep National Park, and embark on a thrilling sea voyage to encounter the elusive killer whale.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E10 - Southern Western Australia
programme.desc: From the towering Karri forests of Warren National Park to the ancient rock formations of The Pinnacles, Western Australia’s southern region is a treasure of natural wonders. In the final installment of Experience Australia, we highlight the best experiences for visitors to this magical region. Explore the pristine coastline and cuddly wildlife residents of Rottnest Island, immerse yourself in an indigenous cultural experience at Yanchep National Park, and embark on a thrilling sea voyage to encounter the elusive killer whale.

programme.title: E1 - Plane Crashes
programme.desc: Aviation is one of the safest forms of travel—until something goes terribly wrong. This episode of Fatal Engineering dives deep into the stories behind some of the most devastating plane crashes in modern history. Through expert analysis, recreations, and insider accounts, we uncover how small design flaws, rushed procedures, and ignored warnings contributed to catastrophic failures. Discover what really brought these aircraft down—and how those tragedies led to life-saving innovations.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E129
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

E5 - Ya Got The Wrong Guy
programme.desc: One wrong move could get anyone booked in; like a son who landed himself in jail after his dad rear-ended a car, or a gearhead who gets spotted by a helicopter after allegedly doing a burnout.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: A teen gives the chilling reason for why she killed her 9-year-old neighbour; a man turns himself in after committing a deadly mistake; an investigator uses her skills to get a killer to open up; and more.

programme.title: E6 - Horror In Starkville Mississippi
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: Dum Laga Ke Haisha
programme.desc: Prem, a school dropout, hesitantly marries an educated but overweight girl, Sandhya. However, the two come closer when they take part in a race, which involves Prem carrying Sandhya on his back. Release Year: 2015 Director: Sharat Katariya

programme.title: Laaga Chunari Mein Daag

programme.title: Kahin Pyaar Na Ho Jaaye
programme.desc: Prem starts drinking as all the girls he falls in love with want to marry 'a rich boy from the US'. Will he marry the girl of his dreams? Release Year: 2000 Director: K. Muralimohana Rao

programme.title: Kalyug
programme.desc: A newly married couple is caught on camera during their honeymoon. When the wife commits suicide after the video is released on internet, the husband sets out to seek revenge. Release Year: 2005 Director: Mohit Suri Awards: 2006 Winner Jury's Choice- Superstar of Tomorrow - Male- Kunal Kemmu

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: The commando, Karanveer Singh Dogra, is approached to chase and catch an Indian criminal gang, who pose a threat to India itself. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Datt

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。
